{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Aekin's full-body Enforcer technique
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Aekin's full-body Enforcer technique]] uses translucent yellow madra.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15">''Wintersteel'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
